lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Hello. I'm the flax keeper. I tend to the flax fields, keeping the yield and continued flax harvest healthy.

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Thank you. I must get back to work. You never know when a great flax harvest will begin!

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Hello. Do you want to exchange some flax banknotes for bowstrings? I'll exchange [amount] for you today, and you can come back tomorrow for more.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't actually bring [amount] flax banknotes with me.

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Oh. Well, if you fetch that many flax banknotes, I'll swap them for bowstrings for you.

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Um... Actually, you seem to have so much stuff that you can't hold the bowstrings.

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Hello again. I'm afraid I won't be able to exchange any more flax for bowstrings today. Try me again tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Hello. I'm the flax keeper. I tend to the flax fields, keeping the yield and continued flax harvest healthy.

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Thank you. I must get back to work. You never know when a great flax harvest will begin!

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Today I can exchange [amount] flax banknotes for bowstrings, if you bring me enough flax banknotes.

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Sorry, your inventory's too full of stuff.

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Hello again. I'm afraid I won't be able to exchange any more flax for bowstrings today. Try me again tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Flax keeper
lines.text: I have a question for you.
